message:
test(fuzz): add text parsing fuzz target for fromfile_text/fromstring

Complements the existing NPY/NPZ binary parser fuzz target by fuzzing
text-based parsing functions with various separators and dtypes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,5 +18,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "text_parsing"
+path = "fuzz_targets/text_parsing.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
